{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323140221DA53219D89EDDF808C3A"}"},"total":6151},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7220296073772286760","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"经典就因为经典，所以成就了经典！本小说：没有穿越、没有奇遇、没有外挂、没有秘境、没有丹药、没有资源、没有谈情、没有说爱、没有天才、没有神功、没有理想、没有伟业、没有……。开篇3000年磨一剑，开启了简单，平凡，神奇，惊叹的人生；找一个人，办一件事，护一个宗门；快意恩仇，杀伐果断，酣畅淋漓；整个设计不落俗套，独树一帜！爽快，舒坦，解气，过瘾；对就是这种感觉！当然文中漏洞有，败笔有，瑕疵有，浮夸有；后半部有幻缺实；也许这些不完美才是完美的一部分，不过我喜欢，萝卜白菜各有所爱嘛！小友有新作品别忘记通知老夫哦！","text_exts":[{"e":139,"s":135,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774245741DF808C3A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227220296073772286760%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226979758459486997517%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681106286,"group_id":"6979758459486997517","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书破万卷，下笔如有神","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N814+9bUmG6R/8hK3F+gKKQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a667da2714684822a864eed8342c15b3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795922&x-signature=DZT65qIdIiBIIjv%2BBeA%2BBEJv%2FgI%3D","user_id":"71997867886","user_name":"摩卡一杯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"71997867886","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1744056099,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":16,"name":"423读书日","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c7865e1c9cc3ce8d4613e7f52dc0fd34","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/421c11bb754900f4bca176159b2e320a"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6979758459486997517","book_info":{"abstract":"世间道法万千，
我只有手中一剑。
一剑，
便可破万千道法。
剑山之下练剑三千年，世人嘲讽鄙夷，只道曾经的绝顶天骄，终究毁在了女人之手，成为一个废物。
殊不知，他只是为了追求那至强一剑。
剑成之日，世间已无敌手。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/593b4b7656329ff5979a233ddbdad50a","author":"哎呀下雨了","author_id":"","book_id":"6979758459486997517","book_name":"什么境界在我面前，都只需一剑","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":80,"name":"剑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=80&name=剑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":868,"name":"剑修","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=868&name=剑修&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6979764315570209288","read_count":"27172","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"580895"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"342","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,剑道,无敌,架空,东方玄幻,打脸,剑修,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/83238613e49fb2faed6a9142ce8a7f1f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429741&x-signature=jQl422KjVaK%2Fljtj7yyzJMmxQ2E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_inf
